forecast-period.text: Clear. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Clear. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north in the early morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the west later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly clear. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border early this evening. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning southerly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Keith. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning southerly 25 to 40 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. A thunderstorm likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Becoming cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly clear. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border early this evening. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the evening then becoming light in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Clear. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers from the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Hawker, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon, possibly severe, with damaging winds, possible hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding near the coast. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the morning and early afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Clear. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon then tending south to southeasterly in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon, possibly severe, with damaging winds, possible hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding east of Ceduna. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then tending south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 33.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning easterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the evening then becoming light in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning, possibly severe, with damaging winds, possible hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the early morning. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Clear. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy in the late morning and afternoon. Possible hail with thunderstorms south of Woomera in the late morning and afternoon. Thunderstorms possibly severe with damaging winds and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding south of Woomera in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to the low 20s with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera in the early morning. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 34.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Clear. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 19 and 24 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 37.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
